title: scutellaria alpina var. pumila
intro: Scutellaria alpina var. pumila is a lesser-known, compact variety of the alpine skullcap plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria alpina var. pumila include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
